name: Rick Laird
abstract: Richard Quentin Laird (February 5, 1941 – July 4, 2021) was an Irish musician, best known as the bassist and a founding member of the jazz fusion band Mahavishnu Orchestra, with which he performed from 1971 to 1973.

concerts.label: It's a Beautiful Day, Psychedelic/Folk Rock Band
Newport Jazz Festival: Cannonball Adderley Quintet, Oscar Peterson, and Mahavishnu Orchestra

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: I did a world tour with him... Chick and I, we had a great time musically. This is three records he played: Mad Hatter, Leprechaun, and Spanish Heart
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
